user_prompt: The cognis heavy stubber awaits a recalibration
prayer:
Approach the cognis heavy stubber with mechadendrites extended in supplication to the Omnissiah.
Invoke the Rite of Recalibration upon its blessed firing mechanisms, beseeching the Machine Spirit to realign its ballistic cogitators.
Anoint the cognis heavy stubber's targeting auspex with sacred unguents whilst chanting the Canticle of Precision.
Sanctify the recalibration through diagnostic litanies, ensuring the cognis heavy stubber's wrath flows true once more.

user_prompt: My Storm Eagle is ready for purification
prayer:
Kneel before the Storm Eagle and intone the Purification Doxology to awaken its noble Machine Spirit.
Purge all unclean residues from the Storm Eagle's plasma conduits with ablative incense and blessed promethium.
Circumambulate the Storm Eagle thrice, asperging its hull with sanctified oils during the purification rite.
Verify the Machine Spirit's purity through auspex scans and the Omnissiah's invocation of clarity.

user_prompt: Sanctify the Archaeopter Fusilave during synchronization
prayer:
Commence synchronization of the Archaeopter Fusilave by aligning its noospheric interfaces to the Omnissiah's will.
Beseech the Machine Spirits within the Archaeopter Fusilave to harmonize their fusillade arrays in sacred unison.
Employ binary catechisms to entwine the Archaeopter Fusilave's cognis-wings with doctrina imperatives.
Conclude the synchronization ritual by sealing the pacts with electro-consecrated sigils upon its fuselage.

In emergency haste, invoke the Omnissiah upon the enginarium to initiate its sacred initialization.
Power-cycle the enginarium's plasma heart with litanies of awakening, purging stasis from its core reactors.
Realign the enginarium's motive force conduits whilst anointing each manifold with holy lubricants.
Affirm initialization complete as the Machine Spirit roars to life in harmonious binary song.

user_prompt: Can you guide radium carbine a recalibration?
prayer:
Present the radium carbine before the altar of calibration, whispering the Omnissiah's decrees.
Undertake recalibration of the radium carbine's emitter coils through precise auspex invocations.
Anoint the radium carbine's flux regulators with rad-phage repellents and precision canticles.
Test the recalibrated radium carbine with a single sanctified discharge, honouring its lethal Machine Spirit.

user_prompt: Bless the Archaeopter Stratoraptor for maintenance
prayer:
Bless the Archaeopter Stratoraptor with mech-rosarius oils prior to maintenance rites.
Dissect its avionic servos methodically, invoking the Machine Spirit's forbearance during maintenance.
Repair and sanctify each raptorial claw and thruster nacelle of the Archaeopter Stratoraptor.
Reassemble under the Omnissiah's gaze, concluding maintenance with a hymn of predatory renewal.

user_prompt: Critical: standard template construct requires a purification
prayer:
In critical need, enact purification upon the standard template construct with utmost reverence.
Expunge heretical data-corruptions from the standard template construct via noospheric exorcism.
Immerse its crystalline matrices in ablutionary fluids whilst beseeching the Omnissiah's purity.
Seal the standard template construct's sanctity through layered binaric seals and spirit-binding oaths.

Amidst emergency, consecrate the macro-cannon with thunderous litanies to the God-Machine.
Anoint its immense barrel and gravitic loaders during the consecration, awakening its apocalyptic Spirit.
Align the macro-cannon's targeting matrices to the Omnissiah's wrathful aim.
Discharge a test salvo in ritual fury, affirming the macro-cannon's divine ordnance blessed.

user_prompt: Assist with optical mechadendrite an engagement
prayer:
Engage the optical mechadendrite by intoning the Rite of Visual Awakening to its Machine Spirit.
Calibrate its ocular lenses with micro-incantations, linking to the noosphere in sacred engagement.
Extend the optical mechadendrite forth, sanctifying its photoreceptors with lens-polishing unguents.
Affirm full engagement through hyper-spectral diagnostics and the Omnissiah's gaze eternal.

user_prompt: Critical: doctrina wafer requires an emergency procedure
prayer:
For the critical emergency procedure upon the doctrina wafer, invoke the Omnissiah's urgent grace.
Extract the doctrina wafer and purge tactical corruptions with binaric purgatives in haste.
Re-encode its noetic pathways during the emergency procedure, beseeching doctrinal purity.
Reinsert the doctrina wafer, sealing it with crisis litanies to restore the Machine Spirit's imperatives.
